---
title: "Developer Guide"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
---

## Overview

The PRISM Ecosystem consists of a backend server built with FastAPI and a web frontend built with Flutter. Both rely on Firebase for authentication and database storage. This guide provides instructions on how to set up the PRISM system locally for development or deployment.

## Firebase
Get a paid project on Firebase and make a new project.

## Unified Setup via Docker

The easiest way to install and run both the PRISM Backend and Frontend is via the [`prism-setup`](https://github.com/Australian-Future-Hearing-Initiative/prism-setup) repository, which uses Docker Compose.

XXXXXXXXXXXXxDocs here!

{{< include _setup_readme.qmd >}}

XXXXXXXXXXXXxEnd here!


## Manual Backend Setup

If you wish to run the FastAPI backend independently without Docker:

{{< include _flutter-backend_readme.qmd >}}


## Manual Frontend Setup

The frontend is a Flutter web application.

{{< include _flutter-web-frontend_readme.qmd >}}
